calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:01am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Annie Pascual/Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellants, Christopher Wachter and Christopher MacDougall present in pro per. Witnesses Jeremy Williams, Thomas Quinlan, Alex MacDougall, and Scott MacDougal present on behalf of Appellants. Respondent, Kevin Cheng present in pro per. Witness Todd Mavis present on behalf of Respondent. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight.

Case called for a recess: 10:23am
Case resumes from recess: 12:53pm
Case called for a recess: 2:07pm
Case resumes from recess: 2:41 pm

EXRA: e-mails
EXA1: call log, returned
EXA2: letters and email, statement; collectively marked
EXA3: Demand letter
EXA4: Email dated 12/13/10
EXA5: Text messages and document marked 5C

3:58pm Appellants examine Mr. Mavis.
4pm Appellants examine Mr. Cheng.

4:05pm
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-17-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:42am
Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Christopher MacDougall present in pro per. Appellant Christopher Wachter not present. Respondent, Kevin Cheng not present. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Roger Sleight.

EXA1: Emails, letters, statements, utilities bill, copy of deposit law, bond measure, CCP 1671 summary; collectively marked.

10:02AM
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.
